go ahead
Is it worth adding this to all navigation menus when on that page? For example, on the posts page, if you click the 'Posts' menu in the navbar, it scrolls back to the top. What do you think?
To be honest, is it better to leave it as it is?
user_feedback_text: To be honest, is it better to leave it as it is?
